meta_description: Over 600,000 awards delivered. Vietnam's leading manufacturer of crystal trophies, commemorative medals, and honor gifts with 15+ years of experience.
hero_subtitle: Over 600,000 awards delivered — each one tells a story
products_desc: 6 main product lines — from crystal honor trophies to wooden honor boards. All produced in-house, no middlemen.
process_desc: From idea to delivery — a transparent 4-step process, you're in control at every stage.
values_desc: More than just products — every order is a partnership, built on dedication, creativity, and responsibility.
clients_desc: From large corporations to small startups — Phùng Thị's products accompany every organization through memorable milestones.

process_steps.title: Design
process_steps.body: You can share your ideas or design directly on our website. We'll help you refine the artwork.

process_steps.title: Approve
process_steps.body: Review and approve the design before we begin production.

process_steps.title: Craft
process_steps.body: Crafted from K9 crystal, alloy or metal with laser engraving technology.

process_steps.title: Deliver
process_steps.body: Quality inspection, premium packaging, and nationwide delivery.

materials_items.name: K9 Crystal
materials_items.desc: Transparent, sparkling, beautifully refracts light. Our flagship product line.

materials_items.name: Alloy
materials_items.desc: Durable, oxidation-resistant, easily plated. Pairs perfectly with crystal and wood.

materials_items.name: Plated Metal
materials_items.desc: Luxurious gold, silver, and copper plating. Maintains luster over time.

materials_items.name: Natural Wood
materials_items.desc: Natural wood base treated against warping. Adds prestige to every product.

values_items.title: HANDCRAFTED EXCELLENCE
values_items.body: Every piece is made by skilled artisans — no soulless assembly line, no mass-produced lack of character.

values_items.title: LIMITLESS CREATIVITY
values_items.body: Logos, signatures, brand imagery — any idea can be engraved on crystal, alloy or metal.

values_items.title: COMPLETE PARTNERSHIP
values_items.body: From the first sketch to the product in your hands — the Phùng Thị team is always ready to support.

clients_items.title: CORPORATIONS & ENTERPRISES
clients_items.body: Anniversaries, client conferences, employee appreciation. Comprehensive honor solutions for any scale.

clients_items.title: SPORTS & TOURNAMENTS
clients_items.body: From grassroots to professional tournaments — trophies, medals and commemoratives for every sport.

clients_items.title: EVENTS & EDUCATION
clients_items.body: Industry conferences, graduation ceremonies, academic competitions, cultural events — honoring every achievement.

clients_items.title: START-UPS & SMES
clients_items.body: Brand gifts, internal recognition. Personalized products with flexible budgets.
